title: helichrysum undulifolium
intro: Helichrysum undulifolium, also known as crevice curry plant, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is a shrubby perennial herb that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Helichrysum undulifolium include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include relieving pain and inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions.
